title: lippia lupulina
intro: Lippia lupulina, also known as the fever tea plant, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lippia lupulina include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Lippia lupulina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
